message:
The other day, while digging through the attic for my old go-bag supplies, I stumbled upon a dusty box of board games. It hit me—remember the days when we’d gather around the table with snacks and laughter instead of screens? It felt like a little treasure trove of low-tech fun waiting to be rediscovered! 

As we’re all thinking about preparedness, I realized how important it is to create moments of connection, especially when life gets a bit hectic. Having a family plan is crucial, but so is having time to just enjoy each other’s company. 

What’s your favorite way to have low-tech fun with your family? This little refresher helped me find that balance!
